content_body: We had a fantastic time in the mountains! The cabin was comfortable and well appointed. The bed was comfy, as was the furniture, although we didn't spend much time at the house. We were out playing most days but loved coming home to the cabin in the evening. We went hiking, waterfalling, and took a trip on the train. There were a few trips to the apple orchard (because that place is the best!) where we walked the grounds and ate some great food. We spent a day in Chattanooga at the aquarium, and the drive from the cabin was beautiful. We look forward to a return trip!
title: Fantastic Time In The Mountains!
